/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib CMakeFiles/RENDERP.dir/src/application/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RENDERP.dir/src/core/gl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RENDERP.dir/src/core/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RENDERP.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RENDERP.dir/src/platform/tgaimage.cpp.o -o RENDERP   -L/opt/X11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/X11/lib -lX11
